failure.error_msg: Test failed with A=1, B=1. Expected 1, got 0 assert LogicArray('0000000000000000', Range(15, 'downto', 0)) == 1 + where LogicArray('0000000000000000', Range(15, 'downto', 0)) = LogicArrayObject(gcd_top.OUT).value + where LogicArrayObject(gcd_top.OUT) = HierarchyObject(gcd_top).OUT

Test failed with A=11264, B=50400. Expected 32, got 0 assert LogicArray('0000000000000000', Range(15, 'downto', 0)) == 32 + where LogicArray('0000000000000000', Range(15, 'downto', 0)) = LogicArrayObject(gcd_top.OUT).value + where LogicArrayObject(gcd_top.OUT) = HierarchyObject(gcd_top).OUT
